name: cnc
description: Clay & Claude guardrails — hooks for precision, redirection, and workflow discipline

for_the_record_mode.title: For-the-record mode
for_the_record_mode.description: How to handle docs/{subdir}/ writes. 'block' redirects to record/. 'warn' allows the write but adds a suggestion. Default: block.

record_subdirs.title: Record subdirectories
record_subdirs.description: Comma-separated subdirs under record/ that for-the-record treats as record-keeping. Default: adrs,decisions,plans,reviews,specs,diagrams,superpowers

handoff_drift_minutes.title: Handoff timestamp drift tolerance (minutes)
handoff_drift_minutes.description: Maximum absolute difference between a new .handoffs/ filename's YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM timestamp and the real current time. Catches agents that hallucinate timestamps off by hours. Default: 5.
